title: K-200 Systems Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 Systems Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-439-D. Revision: D. Type: risk-register. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2023-05-14. Last modified: 2023-08-23. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1151.
